## Checklist

- [ ] I read the code contribution guidelines: https://www.qownnotes.org/contributing/code-contributions.html
- [ ] I opened an issue first, or this pull request is for a trivial change such as a typo or a very small documentation fix
- [ ] I created this pull request against the `main` branch
- [ ] I created a separate branch for this work and did not open this pull request from my own `main` branch
- [ ] I followed the repository's commit message style
- [ ] This pull request does not edit translation files directly, or translation-related changes follow https://www.qownnotes.org/contributing/translation.html
